name: Grafana
description: Grafana — observability & alerting. Imports Grafana datasource health + alert rules as XORCISM Asset Monitoring monitors (MONITORINGCHECK) and firing alerts as incidents (MONITORINGINCIDENT). Offline: a JSON export ({monitors,monitoring_incidents} or Grafana-native {datasources,alert_rules,alerts}). Live: set GRAFANA_URL + GRAFANA_TOKEN (service-account / API key, Bearer). Tool: https://github.com/grafana/grafana.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline JSON export (normalized monitors/incidents, or Grafana datasources/alert-rules/alerts).

parameters.name: base
parameters.help: Grafana base URL (https://grafana.example.com). Overrides GRAFANA_URL. Live needs GRAFANA_TOKEN.
